content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Approved. The IterativeMinimal flow preset is implemented additively and matches the bead spec: FlowPreset variant + CLI/config plumbing, defaults (max=10, stable=2) with cross-key validation (stable<=max, positive), new IterativeImplementerState plus three journal event types (iteration started/completed/loop exited), and an engine loop that uses git diff --binary (HEAD + staged + unstaged + per-untracked hashes) with build-artifact exclusion, a filesystem-walk fallback, correct stop conditions (stable_count>=required => Stable; otherwise iteration>=max => MaxRounds), carry-forward of iterative state, and sidecar-based resume that rewinds to pre-iteration state on missing payload. Existing flows remain single-pass (guarded by minimal_flow_remains_single_pass_without_iteration_events). Unit + CLI integration tests cover happy path, resume paths, sidecar persist failure, no-git fallback, dirty-file detection, preflight skip on recoverable terminal output, and status/tail rendering. Review treats `.ralph-burning/` as out of scope per instructions. Minor non-blocking observations (filesystem fallback does not exclude target/, so non-git workspaces with build output could be slow; iteration-started log may reappear if the first attempt errored before completion) are narrow, well-mitigated by tests, and out of the bead's immediate scope.

## Amendments

None.
